$comment: Hazard control. canRemove looks up data/interactions.json hazardRemoval: toxic spikes are absorbed by a grounded Poison type OR removed by Rapid Spin / Mortal Spin / Defog / Tidy Up. Atom: canRemove.
name: Hazard control

tests.title: A way to remove Toxic Spikes
tests.rationale: Grounded Poison absorb is the common doubles answer; spin/defog also satisfy.

tests.title: A grounded Poison type (absorbs Toxic Spikes on switch-in)
tests.rationale: Expressed directly with the `type` atom + the grounded notion folded into canRemove above; here as an explicit AND.
